titleStmt.title: SII 24.457: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 457. (A.R. No. 353 of 1953-54.) SHRINE OF THE GODDESS RAṄGANĀYAKI, TIERS, NORTH WEST AND SOUTH WALLS.

summary.p: Registers the annual income of the gift village Chōḻangaṅallūr as poliyūṭṭu for expenses towards offering and Friday services to the goddess by Parāśara Bhaṭṭaṉ Sikkayaṅgār (Chikkayyaṅgār) of Harita-gōtra and Āpastamba-sūtra, the priest (purōhita) of Śrīraṅgēśa (i.e. god Raṅganātha). The gift village is stated to have formed the western hamlet (paḍāgai) of Tiruveḷḷarai in Vaḍavaḻi-nāḍu, in Āmūr-nāḍu, a division in Pāchchil-kūṟṟam in Maḻaḷi-nāḍu in Rājarāja-vaḻanāḍu. The details of the date viz. Śaka 1466, expressed by the chronogram tātavandyē Krōdhin, Uttarāyaṇa, Ṛishabha śu. 6, Tuesday, Maghā correspond regularly, to 1544 A.D., May 27, Tuesday, f.d.t. ·2; f.d.n. ·19.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . tātevandye śakasyābde tanoti smopadām śriyaḥ . śrīparāśarabhaṭṭāryya śrīraṅgeśapurohitaḥ . svastiśrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvirasadāśivarāyamahārāyat pṛthivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakābtam 1000 4 100 6 10 6 Itaṉmel cellāniṉṟa krodhisamvatsarattu Uttarāyanattu ṛṣabhanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu ṣaṣṭhiyum maṅkaḷavāramum peṟṟa maghānakṣatrattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇḍyakulāśani vaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāviti vaḷanāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppati nācciyār śrīraṅganāyakiyār śrī paṇṭārattukku Ittiruppati haritagotrattu Āpastamba
sūtrattu śrīparāśarabhaṭṭan śikkayyaṅkāreṉ polivūṭṭukkaṭṭi śilāśāsanam paṇṇivittapaṭi taṇṭuoppa pātaiyil nāṉ sahiraṇyodakadhārāpūrvvagam Āka peṟṟuṭaiyatāṉa vaṭakarai Irācairācavaḷanāṭṭu maḻaināṭṭup pāccilk kūṟṟattu melpalāṟṟu Āmūr nāṭṭu vaṭavaḻināṭṭu tiruveḷḷaraimel paṭākai coḻaṅkanallūr Ūr 1-kku tiru paññīli Ellaikku meṟku parākkiṟamapāṇṭiyaṉ cantai Ellaikku vaṭakku ciṟṟāmūr Agrahāram Ellaikku ña kku kuṉṟattūr Ellaikku � kū kku Iṉṉāṉkellaikku Uḷppaṭṭa puṉceyum kulappaṟṟu nañcaiyum Uḷpaṭa grāmam 1-kku naṭappurekai
varuṣam 1-kku pon_ [7 10 ] Iṟṟai nāḷ varkkam mutaliṭṭa poṉ 2 100 7-kku vaṭṭikku kūṭṭiṉa mātam 1-kku U 100-kku vaṭṭi U 2 Āka kūṭṭiṉa poṉ 4u 1 (1/2) Āka varuṣam 1-kku mātam 10 2-kku vaṭṭiyil kūṭṭiṉa poṉ4 10 9u 8 Āka vakai Iraṇṭiṉāl varuṣam toṟum Utaiyam poṉ100 9 U 8-kku veccam nāḷ 1-kku nācciyār śrīraṅganāyakiyār Amutu ceytaruḷum nācciyār koyilpaṭi taḷikai 4-kku taḷikai 1-kku vilaippaṭi U (1/2) Āka taḷikai 4-kku pratitiṉam 1-kku U 2 Āka mātam 1-kku pon_ 6 Āka varuṣam 1-kku mātam 10 2-kku nāḷ 3 100 4 10 5-kku 100 7 10 3¥ cukkiṟavārak kaṭṭaḷaikku nācciyār śrīraṅganāyakiyār Amutu ceytaruḷum nācciyār koyil paṭittaḷikai 4-kku
[taḷikai 1]- kku vilaippaṭi U (1/2) Āka taḷikai 4-kku U 2 ¥ pori Amutu tiruvaraṅka tevaṉāl 6 kku vilaippaṭi U 2¥ tokaipaṭi 1-kku tocai 5 10 1-kku vilaippaṭi U 3 Aṭaikāy Amutu vilai U (1/2) Ilai Amutu vilai U (1/2) karatti Aruḷa nācciyār koyilp paṭi cantaṉam paṭi 10-kku vilaippaṭi U 1 nta Āka vāram 1-kku cukkiṟavāram 4 Āka varuṣam 1-kku mātam 10 2-kku cukkiṟavāram 4 10 8-kku 4 10 6u 8 Āka Ivvakai kku poṉ 100 9u 8 Intap poṉ nūṟṟuorupattuoṉpatum paṇam Eṭṭukkum Inta niṟṟappaṭi kaṭṭaḷaippaṭi taḷikai nālum Inta cukkiṟavārak kaṭṭaḷaiyum nācciyār śrīraṅganāyakiyār Amutu ceytaruḷi sthānasamayamatukku viniyokam Ākakkaṭa
vatākavum niṟṟak kaṭṭaḷai taḷikai nālukku caturddhāmśam pratidinam Oru taḷikaiyum ciṟappuk kaṭṭaḷai-� cukkiṟavāramtoṟum daśamāmśam Uḷḷatum kūrattāḻvāṉmaṭattile tadīyārādhanattukku candrādityavaraiyum naṭantuvarak kaṭavatākavum
[dānapālanayo]rmmaddhye dānātśreyonupālanam . dānātsvargamavāpnoti pālanādaccutam padam . Intaccilāśāsanam Eḻutiṉamaikku koyil kaṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇapriyan Eḻuttu §The rest is lost.
Digital edition of SII 24.457 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
